title: The Scholar's Legacy
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R+ (ing1+ing2=R+: both share R+), ing6=R+ (ing6 has R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R+ (ing1+ing2=R+: both share R+), ing4=R+ (ing4 has R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R+ (ing1+ing2=R+: both share R+), ing6=R+ (ing6 has R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.
